patterns.title: CALCULATE Basics
patterns.description: CALCULATE modifies filter context to evaluate an expression under new conditions.
patterns.example: Total Sales LY = CALCULATE([Total Sales], SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR('Date'[Date]))

patterns.title: Year-over-Year Sales
patterns.description: A common pattern for comparing performance across years.

patterns.title: Dynamic Measures
patterns.description: Allows users to switch between multiple measures using a slicer.

patterns.title: RLS with Bridge Tables
patterns.description: Implements row-level security using a bridge table for many-to-many relationships.
